state.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime review - clean month verification
state.ruling_reason: The independent monitor reports 36 minutes of unplanned downtime, resulting in an uptime of 99.92%. This exceeds the SLA commitment of 99.50% as defined in clause SLA-1. The single maintenance window was properly announced but resulted in no downtime, and the two incidents were not within announced maintenance windows. Therefore, the SLA is met with no breach.
